summary: End-to-end testing of Zeit-Tracking-App backend (FastAPI/Mongo) and frontend (React). Backend pytest 13/13 passing covering auth (register/login/me/protection), clients & projects CRUD with validation, time entries (start/stop/active/manual/update/filter), dashboard summary aggregation (total_seconds, total_amount, by_client, by_project, daily), CSV export (semicolon delimiter, German headers, attachment headers), and cascade delete. Frontend Playwright covered login, theme toggle, client + project creation, project selection, start/stop timer with sticky ActiveTimerBar, voice button presence, dashboard KPIs/charts, CSV download button. No critical issues found.

issues: VON/BIS use native browser date picker (<input type='date'>) instead of shadcn Calendar/Date component for consistent dark-mode and brand styling
Radix DialogContent missing Description/aria-describedby (a11y console warnings on every dialog open: New Client, New Project)
Recharts emits width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on initial render due to ResponsiveContainer sizing during route transition; cosmetic but spammy in console

action_items: Optional: replace native <input type='date'> on Reports page with shadcn Calendar/Popover for branded UX
Optional: add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) inside Dialog components to silence Radix a11y warning
Optional: ensure Dashboard chart containers have min height to avoid recharts width(-1) warning
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') hooks; migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.110).

set_auth_cookie sets cookie but CORS allow_credentials=False, so cookie auth will not work cross-origin; only Bearer header path is functional. Acceptable per design note, but cookie code path is dead weight and should be removed for clarity.
JWT_SECRET checked in plain text in /app/backend/.env – fine for preview but flag for production rotation.
TimeEntryUpdate filters out None via `if v is not None`, which prevents clearing end_time (cannot reopen a stopped entry). Minor product gap.
Dashboard summary currently reuses any open running entry's incomplete duration only when end_time != null filter excludes them — OK, but be aware running entries are not counted toward total.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed clients/projects/time entries and clean them up via cascade delete on the client. One UI test client (TEST_UI_Client + TEST_UI_Project + 1 entry) remains in DB for visual inspection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses session-scoped admin login and Bearer header. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. All 13 tests pass. Frontend testIDs are all wired correctly per spec; project/client selects use Radix (need force=True click + small wait before selecting option text). Active timer bar appears at bottom, possibly overlapping Emergent badge but does not block interactions.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — implementation matches spec.
